entry.title: REGULAR CROPPED TEE - BLACK
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1299.00

240 GSM. Premium Fabric. Minimal Design. 100% Combed Cotton. Gender-Neutral. Regular-Fit Cropped Silhouette. Relaxed Waist. Combed & Bio-washed.

This premium 240 GSM cropped T-shirt from Drip Studios is designed for effortless everyday wear. Crafted with a clean, minimal aesthetic, it features a regular fit with a relaxed waistline that offers comfort without compromising structure. The cropped length adds a modern edge, making it easy to style across casual and elevated looks. Made from combed and bio-washed cotton, this tee delivers a soft hand feel, breathability, and long-lasting durability. A versatile essential built for comfort, balance, and timeless appeal.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to maintain fabric quality. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to avoid shrinkage. Store in a cool, dry place to preserve the fabric.

Core Features

240 GSM fabric for a lightweight yet premium feel. Regular-fit cropped design with a relaxed waist for easy movement and comfort. Gender-neutral silhouette suitable for diverse body types. Soft, breathable combed cotton ensures all-day wearability. Bio-washed finish for enhanced durability a

entry.title: HENLEY - BLACK
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1499.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'9" WEARING M SIZE

220 GSM. Hefty Cotton Fabric. Slim Fit Body-Hugging Silhouette. 96% Cotton & 4% Spandex. Gender-Neutral. Made in India.

This premium 220 GSM slim-fit T-shirt is designed to elevate everyday essentials with a refined, body-hugging silhouette. Crafted from a luxurious blend of 96% cotton and 4% spandex, it offers the perfect balance of softness, stretch, and structure for all-day comfort. The hefty cotton fabric delivers a smooth, premium hand feel while maintaining breathability and shape retention. Thoughtfully made in India, this tee is built to move with you—enhancing your style with clean lines, superior fit, and lasting quality.

Care Guide

Machine wash inside out with similar colors using cold water. Do not bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to preserve fabric stretch and shape. Iron on low heat if required. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

220 GSM hefty cotton fabric for a premium, structured feel. Slim-fit, body-hugging design that enhances natural shape. 96% cotton and 4% spandex blend for softness, flexibility, and comfort. Breathable construction suitable for everyday wear. Excellent stretch and recovery for long-term shape retention. Made in India with a focus on quality craftsmanship.

entry.title: BLACK DRY-FIT VEST
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: oversized-tees
Price: 1199.00

Lightweight Fabric. Slim Fit. Sleeveless Vest. 100% Recycled Polyester. Dry Fit Performance.

This slim-fit Dry Fit vest is designed for comfort and performance across all athletic activities. Crafted from lightweight recycled polyester, it feels soft against the skin while allowing maximum airflow and unrestricted movement. The moisture-wicking Dry Fit fabric helps keep you dry and comfortable during workouts, training sessions, and active routines. Finished with a clean, minimal silhouette, this vest delivers a sleek athletic look while supporting high-performance wear.

Care Guide

Machine wash with similar colors in cold water. Avoid fabric softeners to maintain moisture-wicking performance. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

Lightweight recycled polyester fabric for breathability and comfort. Slim fit for a close-to-body, performance-ready feel. Sleeveless design for enhanced airflow and freedom of movement. Dry Fit technology helps manage moisture during any athletic activity. True to size—recommended to order your usual size.

entry.title: BLACK DRY-FIT
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: oversized-tees
Price: 1299.00

Lightweight Fabric. Slim Fit. Crewneck. 100% Recycled Polyester. Dry Fit Performance.

This slim-fit T-shirt is designed for comfort and performance across all athletic activities. Crafted from lightweight recycled polyester, it stays soft against the skin while allowing free and easy movement. The Dry Fit fabric helps wick away moisture to keep you feeling dry and comfortable during training, workouts, or active routines. Finished with a classic crewneck and a clean, athletic silhouette, this tee delivers a sleek look that supports performance without compromising comfort.

Care Guide

Machine wash with similar colors in cold water. Avoid fabric softeners to maintain moisture-wicking performance. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

Lightweight recycled polyester fabric for breathability and comfort. Slim fit that stays close to the body for a streamlined look and unrestricted movement. Classic crewneck design for versatile athletic wear. Dry Fit technology helps keep you dry during any athletic activity. True to size—recommended to order your usual size.

entry.title: RAGLAN CROPPED TEE - BLACK
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: Product
Price: 1399.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'9" WEARING M SIZE

240 GSM. Premium French Terry Cotton. Cropped Silhouette with Raglan Full Sleeves. Minimal Design. Gender-Neutral. Combed & Bio-washed.

This cropped 240 GSM full-sleeve T-shirt from Drip Studios is crafted for a clean, super-decent everyday look. Designed with raglan sleeves, it offers a relaxed shoulder fit and effortless movement, while the cropped length adds a modern, balanced silhouette. Made from premium French terry cotton, this tee delivers softness, breathability, and lasting comfort. With its basic, minimal aesthetic and refined finish, it’s a versatile essential that pairs easily with any wardrobe for understated style.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to preserve fabric quality. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage. Store in a cool, dry place to maintain the fabric’s integrity.

Core Features

240 GSM French terry fabric for a lightweight yet premium feel. Cropped length with full raglan sleeves for a relaxed, modern fit. Gender-neutral design suitable for diverse body types. Soft, breathable combed cotton for all-day comfort. Bio-washed finish ensures durability and a smooth hand feel.

entry.title: BLACK POLO
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1499.00

220 GSM. Super Premium Matte Lycra Fabric. Refined Polo Construction. Combed & Bio-washed. Gender-Neutral. Tailored Regular Fit.

This super-premium 220 GSM polo T-shirt from Drip Studios is designed for those who appreciate quiet luxury in everyday essentials. Crafted from a refined matte lycra blend, the fabric offers a smooth, elevated finish with natural stretch for comfort and structure. The tailored regular fit delivers a sharp, composed silhouette, while the classic polo collar adds a touch of timeless sophistication.

Combed and bio-washed for exceptional softness and durability, this polo balances breathability, polish, and long-lasting performance. Built to transition seamlessly from relaxed settings to elevated occasions, it stands as a modern wardrobe staple defined by restraint, precision, and premium craftsmanship.

Care Guide

Wash inside out with similar colors using cold water to preserve the fabric’s finish and depth. Avoid harsh detergents. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain shape and elasticity. Store folded in a cool, dry space to retain its premium quality.

Core Features

220 GSM super-premium matte lycra fabric for a smooth, luxurious finish. Refined polo collar for timeless versatility. Tailored regular fit for a composed, elevated silhouette. Combed cotton blend ensures breathability and all-day comfort. Bio-washed treatment enhances softness, durability, and fabric longevity.

entry.title: STAND ALONE JERSEY
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: oversized-tees
Price: 1699.00

260 GSM 100% French Terry Cotton Boxy Fit V - Neck 3-D High Density Print Front/Back White Fabric Piping on arms and V neck Gender- Neutral. Combed and Bio-washed.

Oversized Boxy Fit V-Neck Jersey T-Shirt – "Fear No One / Against All Odds" Step into bold confidence with our oversized boxy fit V-neck jersey T-shirt, crafted from premium cotton for all-day comfort and effortless streetwear appeal. This relaxed silhouette features a front high-density print that reads "FEAR NO ONE", delivering a strong statement with a clean, elevated texture. On the back, the power continues with a matching high-density "AGAINST ALL ODDS" graphic—because your style should speak just as loud as your mindset. 100% 260 GSM cotton for breathable comfort Oversized, boxy fit with dropped shoulders for a modern streetwear look V-neckline for a relaxed yet refined edge High-density front and back prints for a bold, textured finish Statement graphics: "FEAR NO ONE" (front) / "AGAINST ALL ODDS" (back) Wear it with confidence. Stand for something.

Care Guide

Machine wash the t-shirt inside out with like colors. Use cold water to preserve the fabric’s quality. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage and maintain the fabric’s integrity. Store the t-shirt in a cool, dry place to prevent moisture or mold buildup.

Core Features

T-shirts with 260 GSM (Grams per Square Meter) for a durable and substantial feel. Oversized fit for comfortable and versatile wear by both men and women. Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences. Soft, breathable jersey fabric ensures comfort and airflow.

entry.title: RULES BREAKER I - WAFFLE
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1899.00

240 GSM. Premium Waffle Fabric. Oversized Fit with Raglan Sleeves. Front Embroidery & Back Silicone Print. Gender-Neutral. Combed & Bio-washed.

This oversized 240 GSM waffle T-shirt from Drip Studios is built for comfort with a refined edge. Designed with raglan sleeves for enhanced mobility and a relaxed drape, it delivers a super-comfy yet decent silhouette. The front features a clean embroidered “Rules Breaker” logo, keeping it minimal and premium, while the back makes a bold statement with a high-quality silicone print reading “Rules Breaker.” Crafted from combed and bio-washed cotton waffle fabric, this tee offers breathability, texture, and lasting softness—perfect for elevated everyday wear.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to maintain fabric quality and detailing. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage. Store in a cool, dry place to preserve the fabric and prints.

Core Features

240 GSM waffle fabric for a textured, premium feel. Oversized fit for a relaxed and comfortable silhouette. Raglan sleeves for improved movement and fit. Front embroidered logo with back silicone print for durability and style. Unisex design suitable for multiple body types. Combed and bio-washed cotton for superior softness and long-la

entry.title: CERTIFIED LOVER
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: dripcult
Price: 1649.00

260 GSM. 100% French Terry Cotton. Gender- Neutral. Boxy-Fit. Combed & Bio-washed. Embroidery work front/back.

This 260 GSM black oversized T-shirt is crafted to offer a bold, streetwear-inspired aesthetic with premium details. Designed with a white cloth lining running from top to bottom, as well as from the front neck to the shoulder area, it brings a fresh touch to your look. The front features an embroidered logo, adding a touch of sophistication and an elevated vibe to the piece. On the back, the embroidered “Certified Lover” (that too in embroidery) print adds an extra layer of exclusivity. Perfect for those who appreciate luxury and street style, this T-shirt combines comfort, durability, and high-end craftsmanship.

Care Guide

Machine wash the t-shirt inside out with like colors. Use cold water to preserve the fabric’s quality. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage and maintain the fabric’s integrity. Store the t-shirt in a cool, dry place to prevent moisture or mold buildup.

Core Features

T-shirts with 260 GSM (Grams per Square Meter) for a durable and substantial feel. Oversized fit for comfortable and versatile wear by both men and women. Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences. Soft, breathable jersey fabric ensures comfort and airflow.
